name: Enrollado De Res Con Queso Fresco y Salsa Chipotle
recipeIngredient: 24 ounces Cacique Brand Queso Fresco, cut in 1-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Chipotle Sauce:
- Toss diced tomatoes with oil.
- Grill onions (½ inch thick) and tomatoes over mesquite coals until charred.
- If grilling isn't possible, char tomatoes on a hot skillet, then add onions in a hot pan with oil.
- Add minced garlic and cook for about 2 minutes.
- Stir in oregano, cilantro, rinsed chipotle peppers (veins and seeds removed), and cook slowly covered until tender, about 20 minutes.
- Let the sauce cool, then blend until smooth. Add lime juice and season with salt and pepper to taste. For extra heat, add adobo from the can.
2. Prepare Enrollado de Res con Queso Fresco:
- Place a skirt steak on a cutting board, ensuring it naturally separates into two parts.
- Cut the steak down the middle using a meat cleaver.
- Pound the meat slightly with a mallet or heavy knife.
- Place cheese strips along one end of the steak and roll up tightly to form an envelope.
- Season with salt and pepper.
- Heat oil in a hot skillet, then brown the enrollado on all sides until golden.
- Transfer to a 350ºF (175ºC) oven for about 10 minutes, allowing cheese to melt slightly.
- Serve topped with the Chipotle Salsa and garnished with chopped cilantro.
